Functions for BLE characteristics and commands in AMS and stub functions for ANCS-related BLE operations.


## Files
- **[ams.c](ams.c.md)**: Functions for handling BLE characteristics and commands in the AMS (Apple Media Service) context.
- **[ancs.c](ancs.c.md)**: Stub functions for handling ANCS-related BLE operations and analytics collection.
